title: Increment _TECHMAP_BITS_CONNMAP_ by one since counting from zero

features.name: parameter with zero value used in array range expression
features.description: Code should include a parameter with value 0 that is used in an array range expression like [param-1:0], which creates an invalid negative range [-1:0]

features.name: techmap internal parameters with connmap suffix
features.description: Code should include parameters with names ending in BITS_CONNMAP_ and CONNMAP_ that are used for cell connection mapping in techmap
